problem text: Consider $U \sim \text{Unif}(0,1)$ and $X_1, X_2, \dots \sim \text{Unif}(0,1)$ as independent and identically distributed variables. Let $N = \text{min}\{n \in \mathbb{N} : X_n > U\}$. Determine $\mathbb{E}[N]$. Input $-1$ if the result is infinite.
